headline: Is Block, Inc. (XYZ) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is XYZ a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Block, Inc. on PrimeTrading’s Substack by Alex. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on XYZ. Block, Inc.’s share was trading at $58.99 as of March 19th. XYZ’s trailing and forward P/E were 27.54 and 15.80, respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Block, Inc., together with […]

headline: Affirm, Fintech Stocks Hit by Private-Credit Jitters. Why You Shouldn’t Panic Just Yet.
summary: Affirm stock dropped after concerns about private-credit liquidity tied to LENDX. Analysts say funding demand and loan performance remain strong.

headline: OpenAI's first crack at online shopping stumbled. It's preparing for the next wave
summary: Product selection in Instant Checkout remain limited six months after the feature debuted, and it didn't always show up to date item information.

headline: Watch These 4 Companies, Their Shares Could Rip Higher Once Layoffs Are Announced – Or Maybe Not
summary: The gigantic push towards Artificial Intelligence to turbocharge computer functions and other tasks will greatly benefit society. However, much like the way the automobile replaced the horse drawn carriage, or, more recently, how broadband wifi telecommunications has replaced phone booths and landline phones, A.I. is already replacing many tech jobs. headline: Square Client Wins Test Valuation Story For Block Shares
summary: Square, part of Block (NYSE:XYZ), has secured new clients The Pancake Parlour and The Fish Guy, expanding its presence in hospitality and specialty retail. These wins highlight adoption of Square’s integrated payments and operations platform by both multi location restaurant brands and independent retailers. The developments reflect further ecosystem expansion for Block’s seller business through technology led integrations. Block’s Square ecosystem is adding real world clients at a time...

headline: BUZZ Investing: Geopolitical Shocks Trigger Broad Market Retreat
